cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d1_303_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D1 SW0 public GO C3 case. Non-uniform full horizon plus interval-0 derivative.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d2_911_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D2 SW0 public GO C3 case. Feature-rich pilot with HVDC, reserves, and contingencies.
cases.notes: Primary interval-0 replay and validator-parity pilot.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d3_303_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D3 SW0 public GO C3 case. Uniform 42-period parent plus interval-0 derivative.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d1_315_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D1 SW0 public GO C3 case. High demand, low renewables; 18-period non-uniform horizon.
cases.notes: HIGH demand + ren1 (scarce renewables) - contingency-binding stress case.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d1_345_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D1 SW0 public GO C3 case. Balanced demand and renewables; 18-period non-uniform horizon.
cases.notes: MED demand + ren3 - realistic operating point with both commitment and dispatch churn.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d1_357_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D1 SW0 public GO C3 case. Low demand, high renewables; 18-period non-uniform horizon.
cases.notes: LOW demand + ren4 (~2.3x gen-to-load ratio) - curtailment and export regime.

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d1_369_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D1 SW0 public GO C3 case. High demand, high renewables; 18-period non-uniform horizon.
cases.notes: HIGH demand + ren4 - richest optimization regime (contingency and energy arbitrage both active).

cases.name: go_c3_event4_73_d2_309_sw0
cases.description: 73-bus D2 SW0 public GO C3 case. Day-ahead 48-period horizon, medium demand and low renewables.
cases.notes: MED demand + ren1 - day-ahead time-coupled SCUC example (48 periods).

cases.name: go_c3_event4_617_d1_921_sw0
cases.description: 617-bus D1 SW0 medium-scale GO C3 case using the true 617-bus scenario_921 parent.
cases.notes: Tracked medium-scale native GO C3 example; avoids the mixed-archive 73-bus D2 scenario_921.

cases.description: 1576-bus D1 SW0 medium-scale GO C3 case with HVDC.

cases.description: 2000-bus D1 SW0 medium-scale GO C3 case with dense contingency set.
